commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `captionedFinalText` channel TTS capability, opts Telegram in, and updates ACP/non-ACP final-mode TTS dispatch, tests, and docs so caption-capable channels can defer text into voice-note captions with fallback handling.

PR surface: Source +422, Tests +1545, Docs +81, Generated 0. Total +2048 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main and the latest release settle visible ACP text before final TTS, matching the linked churn report; I did not run a live Telegram TTS repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review remains because the open blocker is current-head Telegram proof plus maintainer acceptance of the new extension-facing capability contract, not a narrow mechanical repair.
